subject: An aven (bird-person) surveyor in mid-flight, wings extended, soaring over a rocky red-orange canyon landscape under a hazy sky
description: A winged humanoid bird-scout surges through the air with wings outspread, body angled forward in a glide. The figure has dark plumage and a hooked beak, rendered in warm earthy browns against a pale washed-out sky. Below and behind, the terrain reads as broken red-orange mesas or canyon spires, suggesting a high-altitude scouting flight over a desert or badlands region. The composition is dynamic, the pose mid-action, and the color palette leans warm despite the card being a blue spell.
foreground: winged aven figure in flight with outstretched wings
background: rocky red-orange canyon spires or mesas under a pale hazy sky
